name: A.D.M(Angels,Demons And Men)
short_description: Angels,Demons And Men(A.D.M) is a difficult apocalyptic hack n slash RPG.Explore the worlds for clues and collect required items.Master combat skills and learn god-like spells,slay various demons and prepare to save the world.
detailed_description:
Angels,Demons And Men (A.D.M) is a story-driven,hack n slash RPG.A void earth draws near.Ancient demons awaken.Darkness creeps in from the shadows.Stand up,take up your weapons and defend the earth in mankind in his final days.

BECOME A .......

A royal knight,Astudent mage or a lost angel.

A NEW ADVENTURE......

Explore various locations and slash enemies in tough combat.Experience the story.

ASCEND IN STRENGTH....

Gather xp points,magic items and rise in strength level.

STORY

In order to save her dying lover,Aya,a witch of the order of nine covens cracked a seal on the gates of hell.Accidentally she released cade and his demons from their prison.Now the earth must stand together to survive this new threat.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Russian, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
